title: Kulirudhu Kulirudhu Lyrics Tajmahal
stanzas:
mazhai illaamalum
thendral solllamalum
nam nenjukul ippodhe
latchm poo malarum.

nenjukuli vittu vittu
thudikkum
adi neruppukkul
yaen indha nadukkam

mazhai mazhai thuli
thollaiyaa
naalai adai mazhai
thakkam ennam ilayaa

adi boogambam velayilum
iru vaankozhi kalavi kollum
dhegathai anaithuvidu
sudum theekooda anaindhuvidum

ada un paechilum
vidum un moochilum
suttri nindraadum
theevannam anaivadhu
thinnam.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kulirudhu Kulirudhu?

The song captures the essence of romantic love and longing, beautifully expressed through its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics.

Who are the singers of Kulirudhu Kulirudhu?

The song is sung by the talented duo Swarnalatha and Unnikrishnan.

Who composed the music for the movie Tajmahal?

The music for Tajmahal was composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

What is the release year of the movie Tajmahal?

The movie Tajmahal was released in the year 1999.

What role does the song play in the movie Tajmahal?

The song underscores a romantic moment, enhancing the emotional depth and connection between the characters.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kulirudhu Kulirudhu is a romantic duet from the movie Tajmahal, beautifully sung by Swarnalatha and Unnikrishnan. The song, composed by AR Rahman and penned by Vairamuthu, evokes feelings of love and longing. It plays during a tender moment in the film, highlighting the emotional connection between the characters. The soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics make it a timeless piece that resonates with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kulirudhu Kulirudhu from the movie Tajmahal, where the magical voices of Swarnalatha and Unnikrishnan blend seamlessly with AR Rahman's soulful music. This romantic duet, penned by the legendary Vairamuthu, captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into a world of soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics that make this song a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: It's cold, it's cold, two souls feel cold, love is the connection.
It moves, it moves, a finger moves, searching for salvation.
If the sea catches fire, the dreams of fish do not fade.
If cities catch fire, the feelings of love do not burn.
It's cold, it's cold, two souls feel cold, love is the connection.
It moves, it moves, a finger moves, searching for salvation.
A pain comes in the heart, touch it with the tip of your eyelashes.
There's a fire burning inside the heart, it's your responsibility to put it out with water.
If you pour water, it will stop; if I pour water, it will change.
Bodies may change, but our hearts will find a new place.
Great joys are the remedy for my femininity.
Even without rain or wind, a thousand flowers bloom in our hearts now.
The heart beats fast, why this trembling in the fire?
Is there no other place for the face and shyness to argue than a kiss?
Is the rain a problem? Is tomorrow's rain not a thought?
When everything around is burning, seeking pleasure is wrong.
Even during an earthquake, two birds embrace, and the body burns but the fire cools.
Even in your words and breath, the fire dances around, consuming everything.
It's cold, it's cold, two souls feel cold, love is the connection.
It moves, it moves, a finger moves, searching for salvation.
If the sea catches fire, the dreams of fish do not fade.
If cities catch fire, the feelings of love do not burn.
